commit.message:
Implement Playwright browser fetch and scheduling

Playwright (browser fetch)
- HttpExecutor gains a browser_fetch=True path using playwright chromium
- Headless browser renders JavaScript before returning HTML — makes
  Amazon, modern Reddit, SPAs, and any JS-rendered site actually work
- enable_browser_fetch=True / EVOSYS_ENABLE_BROWSER_FETCH=true in config
- Lazy import: clear error message if playwright not installed
- bootstrap wires the flag; fetch_method field ("httpx"/"browser") in
  the Observation result for debugging
- Tests: playwright-absent error, httpx fallback stays on httpx path,
  browser path via mocked _fetch_with_browser

Scheduling (watch/inbox)
- ScheduledTaskRow DB table: task_id, description, interval_seconds,
  next_run_at, last_run_at, last_result_json, enabled, created_at
- ScheduleStore: create, get, list_enabled, get_due, record_result,
  disable, delete — all backed by SQLite
- WatchTool: "watch this task every N hours" — writes a ScheduledTaskRow
- InboxTool: lists active watches + latest results; or gets a specific task
- _scheduler_worker background task in server.py: every 60s checks for
  due tasks, runs each through general_agent.run(), stores the answer,
  writes to agent_memory for recall-tool access
- bootstrap wires ScheduleStore + both tools; EvoSysRuntime exposes it
- Tests: ScheduleStore CRUD (18 tests), WatchTool + InboxTool (12 tests)

500 → 528 tests, all passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(apuracao): parser multi-banco e keywords abrangentes

  cobrindo Nubank (data como cabeçalho), Inter, C6 e formatos de valor na
  próxima linha; exporta deduplicar()

  transações (critério determinístico)
- regex.ts: reescrito com KEYWORDS_CREDITO e KEYWORDS_IGNORAR completos
  (30+ entradas), novos exports REGEX_VALOR_FLEX, REGEX_DATA_FLEX,
  REGEX_LINHA_SO_VALOR, LINHAS_LIXO
- classificacao.service.ts: normalizarData() com nomes de mês completos
  (JAN..DEZ + JANEIRO..DEZEMBRO), ano de 2 dígitos, separadores flexíveis

  TRANSFERENCIA genérico removido, mês por nome completo, 422 quando
  mesesConsiderados === 0

Tween system, shader linking, Knuth-Plass text, enzyme elements, async pipelines

- Behaviour: @tween declarative animation with 16 easings, loop/yoyo, programmatic API
- Parser: compileExpr fast path for $binding/path and /slot/path (skip cold parse)
- GPU: #link directive + @link/@optional/@infer shader slot declarations
- GPU: heap accessor lib auto-generation (#import heap), async pipeline creation
- GPU: SSAO, OIT-resolve, tone-map, outline filters; pipeline reflection API
- Surface: InlineCursor + Knuth-Plass balanced line breaking for word wrap
- Surface: conic gradients, @each/@match/@surface/@viewport/@image/@if elements
- Surface: FNV-1a subtree hashing for incremental recompilation
- Main: fiber host integration, tween tick loop in render frame

Auto-return to lobby when opponent leaves after game

When a player clicks "로비로 귀환" after a PvP game, their UID is
written to the leftPlayers array on the game doc. The opponent's
onSnapshot detects this and automatically navigates them back to
the lobby.

commit.message:
fix: deep tech stack audit — 46 issues across 8 layers (#13)

Comprehensive audit covering TimescaleDB, FastAPI, Streamlit, LangGraph agent,
forecasting, FastMCP servers, Redis cache, and APScheduler ETL.

Key fixes:
- Financial: HST decomposition (GST 5% + PST 8%), Ontario 44hr OT-aware labor cost
- KPI targets centralized (labor 35-40%, food cost 32-35%) — no more hardcoded values
- DB: Migration 020 adds tax components, CHECK constraints, indexes, week_start_date
- ETL: KPI rollup aligned to Toast 15-min cycle, recipe refresh 12hr→4hr, retry with backoff
- Cache: Source-scoped invalidation, full SHA256 keys, webhook write-through, warm-up job
- MCP: Canonical wine detection, seasonal weather thresholds, Google Workspace init guard
- Agent: OT-aware counterfactual, dynamic seat capacity, trend detection, message trimming
- API: Key auth on protected routes, MarketMan HMAC verification, forecast horizon warning
- Forecasting: XGBoost early stopping, torch <3.0 pin, LSTM fallback + CI coverage tests
- Dashboard: RevPASH seasonal scaling, beverage % split, waste cost in CAD, ASPC colors

860 tests passing (0 failures).

Co-authored-by: Jiayu Shao <jiayu@MMP.localdomain>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ci): use secrets context for VSCE_PAT/OVSX_PAT conditionals

The `if: env.VSCE_PAT` check was evaluating against job-level env (always
empty) rather than the step-level env where the secret is mapped. This
caused the marketplace publish step to be silently skipped.

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ci+phase4): resolve both CI failures and complete Docker simulation

CI fixes:
- chaos.yml: add --no-cov flag so the 10-test chaos suite doesn't fail
  the 60% coverage threshold meant for the full test suite
- test_node_failure.py: use raw string r"[Mm]agic" to fix RUF043 lint error

Phase 4 Docker simulation fixes:
- docker/Dockerfile: include README.md + LICENSE in build context
  (hatchling requires both; build was failing with OSError)
- docker/docker-compose.yml: restructure env anchors so nodes 1-5
  inherit shared env vars; format SWARM_BOOTSTRAP_PEERS as JSON array
  for pydantic-settings v2 compatibility
- config/settings.py: env_ignore_empty=True so SWARM_BOOTSTRAP_PEERS=""
  on node_0 uses default [] instead of crashing JSON parse
- node/p2p/discovery.py: add _resolve_multiaddr() to DNS-resolve Docker
  container hostnames before constructing multiaddr (multiaddr library
  requires dotted-decimal IPv4, not hostnames)
- node/main.py: add format_exc_info processor to JSON log chain so
  exception tracebacks render in structured logs instead of bool true

New:
- scripts/parse_logs.py: post-run log parser for loss curves, join/leave
  events, adversarial rejections, deferred rounds, and summary stats

commit.message:
fix: remove per-request num_ctx to eliminate Ollama model reload

Each Qwen call specified num_ctx (3072 or 4096) which differed from the
global OLLAMA_NUM_CTX=16384. Every context size change forces Ollama to
reload the model (~1.5s penalty). Pre-route used 3072, route used 4096,
causing TWO reloads per command.

Now all calls use the global default (16384) — model loads once and
stays in VRAM. Expected routing improvement: ~3s saved per command.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

sync magnetic north and contour settings to OriLibre readmap on sim start

When PC simulator starts with OriLibre selected as the readmap background,
syncReadmapOriLibre() is called from initPcReadMap's load callback to apply:
- contour-source tile URL matching current contour interval
- contour layer visibility matching chk-contour state
- magnetic-north source + layer (added post-cache) with current GeoJSON data
- magnetic-north layer visibility matching chk-magnetic-north state

_lastMagneticNorthData caches the latest computed GeoJSON from updateMagneticNorth().

fix: SSL shim allows TLS 1.0 for older Mumble servers on Python 3.14

Python 3.14's PROTOCOL_TLS_CLIENT defaults to minimum TLS 1.2,
ignoring the system OpenSSL MinProtocol setting. Add
MINIMUM_SUPPORTED + SECLEVEL=0 to both SSL shims so pymumble can
connect to servers that only support TLS 1.0 (e.g. older Murmur).
